title: Geometric Folk
description: Ce style se définit par une géométrie vectorielle plate et ultra-minimaliste, rappelant le design graphique du milieu du siècle et l'art folklorique scandinave. Il présente des formes nettes et sans contour, remplies de blocs de couleurs unies et sans ombres, totalement dépourvues de dégradés ou de textures. La profondeur est obtenue uniquement par la superposition de silhouettes naïves et précises dans une composition plane en 2D très structurée.
description_en: This style is defined by ultra-minimalist, flat vector geometry reminiscent of mid-century modern graphic design and Scandinavian folk art. It features razor-sharp, unoutlined shapes filled with solid, unshaded color blocks, completely devoid of gradients or textures. Depth is achieved purely through the overlapping of crisp, naive silhouettes in a highly structured, 2D planar composition.
description_fr: Ce style se définit par une géométrie vectorielle plate et ultra-minimaliste, rappelant le design graphique du milieu du siècle et l'art folklorique scandinave. Il présente des formes nettes et sans contour, remplies de blocs de couleurs unies et sans ombres, totalement dépourvues de dégradés ou de textures. La profondeur est obtenue uniquement par la superposition de silhouettes naïves et précises dans une composition plane en 2D très structurée.
prompt: Ultra-minimalist flat vector illustration, reminiscent of mid-century modern graphic design and Scandinavian naive folk art. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies entirely on crisp, geometric shape-building using solid color blocks. There are absolutely no outlines, no line work, no gradients, and zero shading. Every element is defined by razor-sharp, clean vector-cut silhouettes abutting one another. Utilize a highly structured, limited palette where {{primary_color}} establishes the dominant foundational masses, punctuated by stark geometric focal points in {{accent_color}}, and harmonized by {{secondary_color}}. The lighting anatomy is completely flat; illumination is uniform across every plane, with an absolute absence of distinct light sources, highlights, or cast shadows. The texture is flawlessly smooth digital perfection, completely devoid of noise, grain, or tactile materiality. Spatial dynamics are constructed through a flat 2D planar composition, utilizing naive perspective where depth is achieved strictly by overlapping opaque, hard-edged shapes rather than atmospheric fading or vanishing points. The overall atmosphere is playful, serene, and graphically structured. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. flat vector illustration, minimalist geometry, mid-century modern graphic design, scandinavian folk art, solid color blocks, unoutlined shapes, zero shading, razor-sharp edges, 2D planar composition, clean silhouettes, digital perfection, naive perspective, high-contrast palette, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A pure, ultra-minimalist flat vector background environment, devoid of any foreground subjects. The landscape is constructed from stark, overlapping geometric planes in solid color blocks. Massive foundational shapes in {{primary_color}} form the terrain and sky, layered with angular, hard-edged silhouettes in {{secondary_color}}. Distant, naive environmental details are punctuated by {{accent_color}}. There are no outlines, no gradients, and zero shading. The lighting is completely flat, creating a serene, graphically structured 2D planar space with flawless digital perfection.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure, ultra-minimalist flat vector background environment, devoid of any foreground subjects. The landscape is constructed from stark, overlapping geometric planes in solid color blocks. Massive foundational shapes in {{primary_color}} form the terrain and sky, layered with angular, hard-edged silhouettes in {{secondary_color}}. Distant, naive environmental details are punctuated by {{accent_color}}. There are no outlines, no gradients, and zero shading. The lighting is completely flat, creating a serene, graphically structured 2D planar space with flawless digital perfection. In the foreground, a stark, geometric border frame made of crisp vector blocks acts as an overlay, creating a structured window into the scene. The entire environmental composition and the geometric frame transition sharply into a flat {{background_color}} surface, leaving the outer edges cleanly isolated against the {{background_color}} backdrop.
